notes: Strategy Quality: correct. I mean it's super wired how sometimes it does not stick to one plan for pitstops. Of course it constantly monitors everything like the tyre wear and the current lap and predicts how long till I loose grip but it'd be better if it stick to one plan only and if not followed then change the plan. Else good ERS strategy because in Jeddah it is super difficult to manage and save ERS because of high speed corners and manager ERS while overtaking is super difficult. Great calls by LLM, happy with the results.
